_doc: Entry 100. Rises 100->130 (peak), dips to 122, recovers to 128, dips to 124. With default policy the phase-2 floor ratchets 92->103.5->106->110->115 and then HOLDS at 115 through every subsequent dip. No breach fires (all marks stay above 115). Used to assert floor_trace is monotonic non-decreasing.
